title: PAYMENTS
subtitle: Receipts, gateway attempts, wallet-covered amounts and retry actions for unfinished orders.

errors.partialDescription: Payment history and commerce orders load independently, so one degraded backend dependency does not blank the page.

timeline.title: Payment timeline
timeline.description: A merged view of canonical payment records and commerce orders. Order rows expose wallet and gateway split without leaking provider internals.
timeline.empty: No billing events match this filter.
timeline.retryError: Payment retry failed. Refresh the page or contact support if the order remains pending.

support.title: Need a receipt or dispute review?
support.description: Keep the payment or order ID visible when contacting support. We avoid exposing raw provider payloads in the customer UI.
